mapper.insert: insert into campaign_ab_variants (id, campaign_id, variant_name, split_percentage, message_title, message_body, message_cta_text, message_image_url, impressions, conversions, is_winner, created_at) values (#{variant.id}, #{variant.campaignId}, #{variant.variantName}, #{variant.splitPercentage}, #{variant.messageTitle}, #{variant.messageBody}, #{variant.messageCtaText}, #{variant.messageImageUrl}, #{variant.impressions}, #{variant.conversions}, #{variant.winner}, #{variant.createdAt, typeHandler=io.spring.infrastructure.mybatis.DateTimeHandler})
mapper.select: select * from campaign_ab_variants where campaign_id = #{campaignId} order by created_at
mapper.update: update campaign_ab_variants set variant_name = #{variant.variantName}, split_percentage = #{variant.splitPercentage}, message_title = #{variant.messageTitle}, message_body = #{variant.messageBody}, message_cta_text = #{variant.messageCtaText}, message_image_url = #{variant.messageImageUrl}, impressions = #{variant.impressions}, conversions = #{variant.conversions}, is_winner = #{variant.winner} where id = #{variant.id}
